meta.title: Source Connection Types
meta.desc: Reference card listing the source def kinds supported by the demo task executor.

kinds.description: Look up a key in the hardcoded MOCK_DB dictionary.
Invoke GitHub Copilot CLI with an interpolated prompt template.
Single URL fetch via curl with {{key}} interpolation from _projections. Optional cacheTimeout (seconds).
Fan-out over _projections.url_list (string[]); returns array of raw JSON responses. Build url_list in projections JSONata.
[Legacy] Yahoo Finance chart API — per-ticker requests mapped to quoteResponse shape. Prefer url-list for new sources.
